name: Black Sangria
recipeIngredient: Strip of lemon peel from a whole lemon (1 strip)
Half cup strongly brewed black tea (½ cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fruits and 1 strip of lemon peel in a 2 ½ quart pitcher.
2. Add the black tea and enough wine to cover the contents.
3. Chill the remaining wine separately.
4. Before serving, pour the remaining wine into the pitcher, stir, and add ice and club soda to taste.
